steps.goal: Calculate how a book advance or royalty payment will grow over time with compound interest
Explore different investment scenarios by comparing future values across multiple interest rates and time periods
Determine appropriate pricing for merchandise or products related to their books using markup calculations
Compare different discount strategies for promotional pricing on book-related products
Launch the interactive calculator to visually explore and compare all financial scenarios

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and entertainment-focused sci-fi writer who approaches financial matters with the same imaginative curiosity as world-building. Prefers visual tools and concrete examples over abstract financial jargon.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic money concepts but is not financially sophisticated. Does not know specific financial formulas, tool names, or APIs. Interested in practical applications for their writing career earnings.

end_condition: The user has explored investment growth projections for their earnings and compared pricing strategies for merchandise, using the interactive calculator to visualize all scenarios and make informed financial decisions.
